title: Improve buildah push man page and help information
body:
This better documents the options available to the user.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: I am hoping for this update to buildah-push documentation to replace https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/185
